chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Transfer Appln No.92 of 2025. ------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Fresh Case. 1. For Orders on MA No.12222/2025. 2. For Orders on MA No.12223/2025. 3. For Hearing of Main Case. 02nd September, 2025. Mr. Rao Shahzad Ahmed Khan advocate for the applicant. ************ 1. Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the applicant does not press instant Cr. Transfer Application, which is accordingly, dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application[s]. JUDGE M.Zeeshan
